name: Tomato Bounce
description: Launch your cheerful tomato from platform to platform with a single tap! Hold to charge your power, aim and release. The fewer jumps you use, the more stars you earn - can you reach the goal in one perfect shot? 50 levels, 5 vibrant fruit worlds, obstacles, moving platforms and portals are waiting for you. Simple to learn, hard to master. How many stars can you conquer?
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
